approvalsDesc: Review and approve pending node enrollment requests created via bootstrap tokens.
emptyPending: No pending enrollment requests. Create a bootstrap token to start.
bootstrapDesc: Issue a one-time token for remote self-enroll flows.
registryDesc: Query registered nodes, inspect derived health and policy attachment, and maintain records with read, update, and delete actions.
healthyNodesDesc: Nodes with recent heartbeat and no degraded signal.
degradedNodesDesc: Nodes reporting non-healthy listener or certificate state.
staleNodesDesc: Nodes whose heartbeat freshness window has already expired.
unreportedNodesDesc: Registered nodes without any heartbeat record yet.
emptyRegistry: Create a bootstrap token and enroll the first node to populate the registry.
registrySearchPlaceholder: Search by name, id, scope, parent, or host
noMatchingNodesDetail: Adjust the current query or filters to see matching nodes.
editNodeDesc: Update metadata, exposure, and runtime state for the selected node.
topologyDesc: Inspect parent-child links together with live transport state to verify a -> b -> c tunnel overlays.
publicTransportsDesc: Directly reachable node entrypoints synthesized from public endpoint records.
reverseTunnelsUpDesc: Parent-child reverse_ws_parent sessions currently reporting connected.
reverseTunnelsBlockedDesc: Configured reverse tunnels that are not currently connected.
emptyTopology: Parent-child and relay trust links are listed here.
noRuntimeTransports: No runtime transports have been reported yet.
defaultPasswordHint: If the node started without NODE_JOIN_PASSWORD, enter password above and set the replacement password here.
